content_body: Gary and Lissa, We had a wonderful time in Blue Ridge. The cabin and the scenery exceeded our expectations and we would absolutely come back again and vacation in the area. There were some things we wanted to do that we did not have time for so we are looking forward to a return trip in the future. The cabin was top notch and we would rent with you again. We also have some interest in investment potential for the future so if you have any info you could pass along we would appreciate it.
title: Enjoying the North Georgia Scenery
